sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 21.132 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.21)

statement.latex: Based on the development of E.\,S.\,Golod's construction (see, for example, Discrete Math. Appl., { 23}, no.\,5--6 (2013), 491--501), for each prime number$p$, construct a finitely generated residually finite$p$-group with a non-trivial finite centre. Such groups with infinite and trivial centres are known (see 9.76 and Archive 11.101).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
